name: Applesauce Leather
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer apples over medium heat for about 20 minutes or until very soft.
2. Place in blender and add the remaining ingredients.
3. Dehydrate in a dehydrator or oven at the lowest possible setting (about 140 degrees Fahrenheit) until the fruit feels leather-like yet pliable.
4. This is best done on parchment paper. Remove the leather while it is still warm and roll it up.
